# Telemetry selectors report (1d)
# args: {__name__="e2etelemetry:chain_top:max"}
# Results depend on the queried Prometheus instance and may differ elsewhere.
selectors:
  - selector: '{__name__="e2etelemetry:chain_top:max"}'
    metrics:
      - name: e2etelemetry:chain_top:max
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: max(e2etelemetry:chain_deep:sum) / e2etelemetry:etcd_has_leader:max
          tree: |-
            ├── e2etelemetry:chain_deep:sum
            │     <expr: sum(e2etelemetry:chain_mid:ratio) + e2etelemetry:chain_leaf_a:max>
            │     <value_range: V> <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
            │   ├── e2etelemetry:chain_mid:ratio
            │   │     <expr: e2etelemetry:chain_leaf_a:max / e2etelemetry:chain_leaf_b:sum>
            │   │     <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
            │   │   ├── e2etelemetry:chain_leaf_a:max
            │   │   │     <expr: max(etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"})>
            │   │   │     <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
            │   │   │   └── etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"}
            │   │   │         <job: etcd> <peak_series: N>
            │   │   └── e2etelemetry:chain_leaf_b:sum
            │   │         <expr: sum(etcd_disk_wal_fsync_duration_seconds_count{job="etcd"})>
            │   │         <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
            │   │       └── etcd_disk_wal_fsync_duration_seconds_count{job="etcd"}
            │   │             <job: etcd> <peak_series: N>
            │   └── e2etelemetry:chain_leaf_a:max
            │         <expr: max(etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"})>
            │         <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
            └── e2etelemetry:etcd_has_leader:max
                  <expr: max(etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"})>
                  <value_range: V> <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
    failing_checks:
      count: 2
      messages:
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:chain_top:max" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:chain_top:max" has suffix :max, expected :ratio based on the expression
